Container.Name: frc-archiver
Container.Overview: Archives FRC YouTube videos from TheBlueAlliance with yt-dlp and a web dashboard. Downloads event livestream VODs and team match videos, tracks state in SQLite (keyed on the YouTube ID so tdarr transcodes never trigger re-downloads), and skips in-progress livestreams. Bundles Deno + ffmpeg.
Container.Description: Self-hosted FRC YouTube archiver. Set the Media path to the same share tdarr watches. Add teams/seasons/districts and your TheBlueAlliance key in the web UI. No authentication - keep it on your LAN.

Config.Name: Config (DB)
Config.Description: Holds the SQLite database and an optional cookies.txt.

Config.Name: Library (tdarr share)
Config.Description: Where videos are downloaded. Point this at the SAME share tdarr transcodes.

Config.Name: TBA API Key
Config.Description: TheBlueAlliance read key (thebluealliance.com/account). Optional - can also be set in the web UI.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns downloaded files (99 = nobody, so tdarr can replace them).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns downloaded files (100 = users).
